title: AWS Bedrock Added Grok 4.3 From xAI
summary: AWS announced Grok 4.3 from xAI on Amazon Bedrock, describing a reasoning-first model with configurable reasoning effort, tool use, structured output, streaming, and Mantle inference-engine support for price/performance-sensitive workloads.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official source reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Evaluate Grok 4.3 regional availability, quotas, pricing, and tool-calling behavior before adding it to Bedrock routing policies.
Benchmark Mantle-backed Grok 4.3 price/performance and reasoning-effort settings against existing Bedrock model routes.

estimated_cost_effect.magnitude: AWS describes token efficiency and Mantle price/performance, but APW did not verify invoice-level deltas.

detail.migration_notes: This event records Bedrock-hosted model availability, not xAI first-party API availability or exact account eligibility.

limitations: The source-review candidate classified this as a pricing change; source-owner review corrected the event to model availability with cost/performance impact.
APW does not copy AWS announcement prose or assert measured latency/cost.
